title: psoralea candida
intro: Psoralea candida, also known as Indian turnip or Huang Qi, is a plant species native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Psoralea candida include improving immune function, reducing inflammation, and supporting bone health, making it a popular ingredient in supplements and herbal remedies. Psoralea candida can be prepared into various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
